data_boundary_amendment.reason: the exact qualified shared SPY execution input begins in 2018
data_boundary_amendment.amendment_interpretation: outcome-blind data-feasibility amendment, not preservation of an unchanged 2010 design

economic_hypothesis.mechanism: a positive 10-year minus 3-month Treasury slope indicates a more supportive growth and funding state for broad US equity exposure; a nonpositive slope moves the sleeve to cash
economic_hypothesis.primary_source: Federal Reserve H.15 observations preserved through official ALFRED real-time-period history
economic_hypothesis.null_hypothesis: the frozen binary term-spread state does not improve net monthly Sharpe relative to buy-and-hold SPY

closed_lineage_distinction.spy_200_day_trend_cash: exogenous Treasury curve state rather than SPY price trend
closed_lineage_distinction.m119_01_realized_volatility: binary macro state rather than continuous lagged realized-volatility scaling
closed_lineage_distinction.dual_momentum_and_inverse_volatility: one fixed SPY/cash sleeve with no cross-asset ranking or allocation

frozen_specification.availability_rule: available_at_conservative equals 23:59:59.999999 America/New_York on ALFRED realtime_start date and must be no later than the bound SPY decision_at
frozen_specification.observation_selection: latest common nonmissing observation_date for DGS10 and DGS3MO available by decision_at
frozen_specification.revision_policy: use only the official ALFRED real-time-period rows in the exact input file; current revised FRED history, realtime_end, interpolation, mixed observation dates, T10Y3M substitution and later repair are forbidden
frozen_specification.target_rule: SPY weight is 1.0 if spread is strictly positive and 0.0 if spread is zero or negative
frozen_specification.rebalance_rule: monthly static target rebalance; transaction costs apply only to actually executed turnover
frozen_specification.decision_time: 20:05 America/New_York on the final accepted XNYS session of the signal month
frozen_specification.sizing_price: final accepted raw SPY close available by decision_at
frozen_specification.corporate_actions: official bound cash distributions and splits applied once under shared portfolio accounting
frozen_specification.benchmark: buy SPY at the first Screen-A entry, hold with identical corporate-action accounting, then sell at the terminal exit; no dividend reinvestment

screen_a.label: RETROSPECTIVE_SECONDARY_SCREEN_A
screen_a.zero_volatility_rule: an all-zero monthly return path has Sharpe 0.0 and is mechanically tested against all four gates; any nonzero monthly-return path with max minus min no greater than 1e-12 fails closed as undefined
gates: strategy Sharpe minus SPY Sharpe is strictly positive
strategy compounded net return is strictly positive
strategy annualized volatility is strictly lower than SPY
strategy maximum drawdown is strictly better than SPY
screen_a.failure_rule: any failed gate permanently closes M119-03 and inference B remains unopened

inference_b_if_unlocked.label: RETROSPECTIVE_SECONDARY_INFERENCE_B
inference_b_if_unlocked.invalid_replicate_rule: any nonfinite statistic or zero standard deviation fails closed
inference_b_if_unlocked.primary_gate: both local and program one-sided lower confidence bounds must be strictly positive
inference_b_if_unlocked.additional_input_requirement: a separately frozen 2022-2026 SPY/calendar/action bundle is required only after Screen A passes

bootstrap_contract.index_algorithm: first=floor(U*n); thereafter restart with probability 1/6 to floor(U*n), otherwise advance prior index by one modulo n
bootstrap_contract.pairing: one shared index path resamples strategy and SPY monthly returns
bootstrap_contract.invalid_replicate_rule: any nonfinite statistic or zero standard deviation is a terminal fail-closed result
gates: local one-sided lower bound is strictly positive
program one-sided lower bound is strictly positive

technical_continuation_1.reason: the prior claim stopped before the first completed rebalance because the runtime bundle used the unsupported label raw_signal_session_close for an otherwise raw execution-unit decision close
technical_continuation_1.repair: replace decision_price_basis with raw_execution_units in exactly 54 execution records and rebind the unchanged H15 rows to the repaired bundle

technical_continuation_2.authorization_basis: the owner directed completion of data-blocked strategies on 2026-07-23; the prior continuation produced no Inference-B strategy statistic
technical_continuation_2.reason: the prior continuation passed the exact external market label US directly into the shared-core internal market enum us and stopped before the first completed rebalance
technical_continuation_2.repair: require the exact external market label US and map only that value to the shared-core internal market enum us before any callback
